name: IRIS Environmental Laboratories
description: Provides expert mold inspection and testing services in Montgomery County for homes and businesses.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: The personnel at IRIS labs is well beyond my wildest expectations.
Rick and his team are the best when it comes to customer service and industry knowledge.
Fast yet accurate service testing they provide with a quick turn around
Made us feel like our safety was top priority. They made this process very easy.

sentiment.summary: IRIS Environmental Laboratories has an exceptionally strong reputation with consistently positive reviews praising their professional staff, rapid service delivery, expertise, and customer-centric approach across all services.
